summary: Excellent Charlie Miller soundboard captures the Dead's final Minnesota visit with crystal‑clear audio.
review: The fan praises this Charlie Miller soundboard as a high‑fidelity document of the Grateful Dead’s last show in the North Star state, calling it “great sounding.” No specific musical moments are mentioned, but the overall tone is enthusiastic and appreciative of being able to hear another well‑recorded Minnesota performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review highlights excellent soundboard quality and overall enjoyment; lack of detail on the musical performance limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes a “nice” and “great sounding” board, with no reported issues—implying clear, balanced audio.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer focuses solely on the recording quality and historical significance of the show.
